title: Flowchart node creation dialog with type selection and preview
purpose: Provides a modal interface for users to create new nodes in a flowchart diagram with label input, type selection, and live preview.
module_context: Exports a CreateNodeDialog component that manages form state for node creation, handles keyboard shortcuts, and renders a modal with input fields, radio buttons, and a live preview of the node shape.

steps.content: Parse the node style string to extract fill and stroke colors.
Determine the CSS classes for node shape based on the node type.
Render a diamond shape for decision nodes using CSS transforms.
Render other node types as rectangles with rounded corners and appropriate styling.
Initialize form state for node label and type.
Set up effect to reset form and focus input when dialog opens.
Set up keyboard event listener to close dialog on Escape key.
Handle form submission to create node with validated label and type.
Handle backdrop clicks to close the dialog.
Render the dialog overlay and form with input fields, radio buttons, and preview.
Validate that the label is not empty or whitespace.
IF the label is valid, call the onCreate prop with the label and type.
Close the dialog after successful creation.
Check if the click target is the backdrop element.
IF the click is on the backdrop, call the onClose prop to close the dialog.
